photoHero: Rajyash Food Porter volunteers serving rescued meals on an Ahmedabad street
photoDonor: Rescued food being served to people in need
photoVolunteer: A Food Porter volunteer ladling a hot meal into a bowl
photoAbout: Volunteers distributing rescued food at night in Ahmedabad
heroSub: Since 2016, the Rajyash Foundation has turned Ahmedabad's surplus into dignity. Every evening, volunteers still carry warm meals across the city — and this page counts them as they go.
photoHeroAlt: Volunteers handing out warm evening meals from tiffins on an Ahmedabad street
programsTitle: Six ways we lift our city.
prog1Desc: Tree drives that give Ahmedabad cleaner air and shade.
prog2Desc: Books, supplies and support for children who deserve to rise.
prog3Desc: Rescue, feeding and care for the creatures who share our streets.
prog4Desc: Surplus food, rescued warm and carried to people in need — every evening.
prog5Desc: Community fairs that raise support and bring the city together.
prog6Desc: Blood-donation drives, disaster relief, and everyday kindness all year.
fpTitle: The rescue loop runs on software now.
fpBody: A donor posts surplus food. A volunteer nearby claims it, picks it up while it's still warm, and delivers it to people in need — often within the hour. Every step is logged, so nothing is lost and nobody is guessing.
photoFpAlt: Two Food Porter volunteers serving rescued food from steel containers
impactTitle: Every meal counts — so we count every one.
impactSub: Real numbers from the field, updated as rescues happen.
impactProvenance: Counted directly from deliveries logged in the Food Porter app — not estimates. Updated as each rescue is marked delivered.
statMealsNote: warm meals to people in need
statKgNote: of good food kept from waste
photoStoryAlt: A Rajyash Foundation volunteer during an evening food run
photoStoryCaption: A volunteer on the evening route · Ahmedabad
storyQuote: I drive for an hour after work. By the time I'm home, forty people have eaten.
storyBody: Most of our volunteers give a couple of evenings a month. That's all it takes to keep the loop turning.
howTitle: The rescue loop, in three simple steps.
howSub: From a donor's extra food to someone's plate — often on the very same day.
step1Desc: A restaurant, family, or event planner lists what's left over and a pickup time.
step2Desc: A nearby volunteer driver accepts the request and collects the food while it's fresh.
step3Desc: The meal is delivered to a shelter or community kitchen — warm, safe, and with dignity.
helpSub: Both keep the rescue loop turning. Choose the one that fits you.
donorDesc: Restaurants, families, and event planners — turn extra food into someone's next meal instead of waste.
volDesc: Have a couple of hours and a way to travel? Pick up nearby and deliver hope across the city.
fundsDesc: Monetary giving is on its way — leave your email and we'll tell you when it opens.
aboutTitle: A warm idea from the Rajyash Foundation.
aboutBody: The Rajyash Foundation is the social arm of the Rajyash Group, based in Ahmedabad. Since 2023 we've connected everyday surplus food to the people who need it most — turning abundance into dignity, one meal at a time.
aboutTrust: A registered social initiative of the Rajyash Group
quote: No one in our city should sleep hungry while good food goes to waste.
finalTitle: Good food, in the right hands.
finalSub: Whether you have food to give or a few hours to drive, there's a place for you in the loop.
footTagline: Rescuing surplus food, with warmth — across Ahmedabad.
footAbout: A social initiative of the Rajyash Group, serving Ahmedabad since 2016.
footRights: © 2026 Rajyash Foundation. An initiative of the Rajyash Group.
